issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on the happy path.

scenarios.name: Reduce a multi-feature SaaS idea into a weekend-shippable MVP
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies the Three Stages (Manual/Processized/Productized), the Four Build Questions (weekend, life-better, willing-to-pay, fast-feedback), and recommends existing tools (Carrd/Gumroad/Stripe) per the skill; baseline gives generic 'cut scope, talk to users' advice without the structured framework.

scenarios.name: Decide what to deliberately NOT build for a v1 freelancer tool
scenarios.rationale: Treatment names a single thing, sets a paid price from day one, defers features until N+ paying customers, and explicitly lists what NOT to build (accounts, polish, mobile) following the skill's checklist; baseline produces a generic feature-cut list without the 'charge from day one' and 'forms and lists' framing.
